title: D-Bus server (org.freedesktop.Notifications)
notes: Implemented src/dbus.rs with zbus 5 #[interface] macro. Notification struct (updated to store Urgency after task 4). NotificationServer holds NotificationQueue + AtomicU32 counter + Option<Arc<AudioPlayer>>. All four interface methods implemented. src/main.rs wires tokio runtime, session bus, ctrl-c keepalive. Added anyhow workspace dep; enabled env-filter feature on tracing-subscriber.

title: Wayland layer-shell popup surface
notes: Implemented src/surface.rs. NotifySurface owns wgpu Instance/Surface/Device/Queue/SurfaceConfiguration + Wayland state. NotifySurfaceState implements all sctk delegate traits (CompositorHandler, LayerShellHandler, OutputHandler, SeatHandler, ProvidesRegistryState). Anchored TOP|RIGHT, margin 16px, exclusive_zone=-1. wgpu 23 Instance::new takes value not ref. Added pollster and raw-window-handle workspace deps. Wayland event loop runs via spawn_blocking in main.rs.

title: wgpu notification card rendering
notes: Implemented src/renderer.rs. NotificationRenderer uses glyphon 0.7 API (Cache + Viewport). WGSL quad pipeline with RectUniform (bytemuck Pod/Zeroable). Renders BG_SURFACE clear, urgency accent bar (8px left), BG_LIGHT card, summary+body text via glyphon. Alpha applied to all colors. Signature updated to take width/height for viewport. Added bytemuck workspace dep.

title: Urgency heat mapping
notes: Implemented src/urgency.rs. Urgency enum with from_byte, from_hints (matches Value::U8), to_color (ThermalPalette COOL/WARM/SEARING), default_timeout_ms. Updated dbus.rs to store Urgency instead of u8. mod urgency + pub use in main.rs.

title: Auto-dismiss timer
notes: Implemented src/timer.rs. DismissTimer: id, deadline (Instant), fade_duration (300ms), dismissed. alpha() returns 1.0 before deadline, linear lerp 1→0 during fade, 0.0 after. is_expired() when alpha==0. new() returns None for timeout_ms==0 (persistent); negative timeout defaults to 5s.

title: Notification queue + stacking
notes: Implemented src/stack.rs. ActiveNotif holds Notification, Option<DismissTimer>, y_offset, target_y, alpha(). NotificationStack (card_height=100, gap=8): push inserts at top shifts others down; remove_id removes and retargets; tick lerps positions at speed 12*dt and removes expired; iter_visible filters alpha>0; len/is_empty/card_height/gap accessors.

title: PipeWire audio cues
notes: Implemented src/audio.rs. AudioPlayer holds only Sender<Urgency> (Send+Sync) — rodio OutputStream is !Send so it lives on a dedicated thread that loops on mpsc channel. Low=440Hz/150ms/0.3amp, Normal=660+880Hz sequential, Critical=880Hz x3 with 150ms spacing. NotificationServer holds Option<Arc<AudioPlayer>>; plays on notify(). AudioPlayer::new failure is non-fatal.
